variants.title: Filtrec WG967 Special Filter | Replaces the Argo-Hytos V3094108
variants.option1Value: Filtrec WG967 Special Filter | Replaces the Argo-Hytos V3094108
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec WG967. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the WG967 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Special Filter, Media: Glass Fiber, Efficiency 1: 15µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 17µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 105.8 mm, Inner Diameter: 90.0 mm, Length: 445.0 mm, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 15µ @ β200, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Flow Direction: IN-OUT, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: Argo Hytos V3.0941-08 Special Filter
variants.description: Original Argo-Hytos V3.0941-08 filter. Benefits - Reliable oil cleanliness and permanent protection of sensitive components over the entire operating life. - Good cold start performance, i.e. closed bypass valve even at low temperatures. Lower energy consumption results in lower operating costs and conserves resources. - Longer maintenance intervals and thus improved productivity and economic efficiency. - Excellent differential pressure stability, ensuring filtration stability by avoiding damage to the filter bellows. - High flow fatigue strength which guarantee of oil cleanliness even with strongly alternating flow loads.

variants.title: MicroFit® MFHSP80848 UltraGen III Special Filter | Replaces the Argo-Hytos V3094108
variants.option1Value: MicroFit® MFHSP80848 UltraGen III Special Filter | Replaces the Argo-Hytos V3094108
variants.description: MicroFit® MFHSP80848 UltraGen III Special Filter. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHLP30166 is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of OEM quality standards, ensuring superior filtration performance and the longest possible filter life. Building on over 50 years of filtration expertise, the UltraGen III series is the third generation of MicroFit® filter media, delivering exceptional efficiency and reliability. FilterFinder is an approved distributor of MicroFit® filters. With expert product knowledge, dedicated support, and a large stock availability, FilterFinder ensures you receive the parts you need when you need them, every time.
